title: 14Pcs Happy Mother's Day Cupcake Toppers Glitter Mum's Day Love Mum Cake Decorations Rose Butterfly Best Mom Ever Heart Cupcake Toppers for Best Mom Party Decorations (Gold)
features: 【Package】You will get 14 pieces of rose gold happy mothers day cupcake picks, enough for you. The mothers day cupcake decorations supplies size is 2.6*3.5 inch (with stick)
【Durable Materials】Mother's Day cupcake toppers are made of high quality glitter cardboard and toothpicks, convenient and lightweight, no smell, not easy to damage and fade.
【Easy to Use】Mother's Day cupcake toppers comes with assembled, just insert them directly into the cupcakes, making your cakes more interesting, cute and attractive.

【Mother's Day Decoration】The special happy mothers day cupcake toppers are one sided design, the backside is plain white, and the surface is a glitter material with a delicate heart design cupcake picks, perfect for decorating your cupcake, ice cream, fruit, cake or other desserts.

【Applicable Occasions】 Happy Mother's Day cupcake picks are specially designed for Mother's Day party. You can also use it for mother's birthday party and gift box decorations, which can well express your wishes to mother and increase the warm festive atmosphere.
